paper.title_en: Effective dynamics and quantum information in de Sitter wedge holography
paper.abstract_en: In this paper, we study codimension-two holography in a de Sitter (dS) wedge setup, based on the idea of wedge holography. We consider a $d+1$-dimensional Anti-de Sitter (AdS) bulk spacetime bounded by two end-of-the-world branes with $d$-dimensional de Sitter geometry. We propose that this configuration is holographically dual to a conformal field theory (CFT) living on a $d-1$-dimensional sphere. Our computations of the partition function and holographic entanglement entropy support this duality and indicate that the dual CFT is non-unitary. We also analyze the mass spectrum in dS wedge holography. We verify the first law of entanglement entropy within this framework. Finally, we make use of the island prescription to study the Page curve in a simplified model within our dS wedge holography framework.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文研究德西特楔形全息中的有效动力学和量子信息，涉及全息对偶、纠缠熵、佩奇曲线等，主题与全息凝聚态和黑洞热力学相关，具有理论深度和新颖性。
decision.title_zh: 德西特楔形全息中的有效动力学与量子信息
decision.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们基于楔形全息的思想，研究了德西特楔形设置中的余二维全息。我们考虑一个 $d+1$ 维反德西特体时空，其边界由两个具有 $d$ 维德西特几何的端世界膜界定。我们提出该构型全息对偶于生活在 $d-1$ 维球面上的共形场论。我们对配分函数和全息纠缠熵的计算支持这一对偶性，并表明对偶的共形场论是非幺正的。我们还分析了德西特楔形全息中的质量谱。我们在该框架内验证了纠缠熵的第一定律。最后，我们利用岛处方在德西特楔形全息框架内的简化模型中研究了佩奇曲线。
